raw_consumer_statement: Someone opened a Best Buy credit card in my name and charged {$3900.00} to it on XX/XX/XXXX. I received the Best Buy card in the mail on XX/XX/XXXX and closed the account on XX/XX/XXXX. I received the bill from Best Buy through the mail on XX/XX/XXXX. Prior to this I had not realized the card had actually been used.
